summary: Full backend + frontend testing of image verification endpoint, Gemini fallback, auth flows, and API key management. All 9 backend tests passed. Landing page and login page fully functional.

issues: Tech Stack shows 'HuggingFace / SDXL Detector' which is outdated — actual AI model is local-forensic-v1 + Gemini 2.5 Flash. Minor cosmetic inaccuracy.

action_items: Optional: Update 'For Judges' tech stack card to reflect Gemini 2.5 Flash instead of SDXL Detector/HuggingFace
critical_code_review_comments: NaN/Infinity check passed — all float values are valid JSON numbers
Gemini fallback triggered correctly: gradient image (ai_score=0.5355 → ESCALATE) → gemini_used=true → REJECT verdict
Register endpoint returns flat user fields (email, user_id, name, picture, plan) not nested under 'user' key — minor inconsistency with auth/me response format but functional
GET /api/keys returns {keys: [...]} not a plain array — worth noting for API consumers
seed_data_creation: Registered fresh test user: verify_test_<timestamp>@test.com / Test1234!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gemini fallback tested and confirmed working: 512x512 gradient JPEG → local ai_score ~0.54 (ESCALATE) → gemini_used=true → REJECT. No NaN/Infinity in responses. Landing hero buttons ('Start Free — 100 Verifications' → /login, 'View for Judges' → scrolls). Login form works end-to-end → redirects to /dashboard. GET /api/keys returns {keys: [...]} not plain array.
verified_tests: PASS: POST /api/v1/verify with real noisy image → APPROVE, no errors
PASS: POST /api/v1/verify response has no NaN/Infinity values
PASS: POST /api/v1/verify with gradient image → gemini_used=true, valid REJECT verdict
PASS: Response structure has all required fields (audit_id, verdict, confidence, rationale, gemini_used, forensics_json)
PASS: POST /api/auth/register creates user and returns session_token
PASS: POST /api/auth/login with testpharmacy@rxguard.test returns session_token
PASS: GET /api/auth/me with Bearer token returns user email
PASS: GET /api/keys returns keys list (14 keys for test user)
PASS: POST /api/keys correctly returns 403 when plan limit reached
PASS: Landing page loads, hero buttons clickable and functional
PASS: Login page loads, form usable, login redirects to /dashboard
